headline: Levi Kalish
image_alt_text: A social card featuring verified Hush Line user Levi Kalish, their bio, their tip line URL, and a QR code that links to the same URL.

social.bluesky:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Levi Kalish covers LGBTQ+ rights for HuffPost, including the Trump administration, attacks on trans rights, and organized resistance. Signal @levikalish.01.

Send Levi a tip: https://tips.hushline.app/to/LKalish

🤩 Verified Member Highlight!
